segments.text: Wait, I saw these three products that actually [music] fix this problem that we all have. First, washing dishes is already annoying. And then we have to
pick up the soap bottle with our wet hands. But this smart soap dispenser fixes it. You just pour the detergent in and press your sponge down to get the
exact amount of soap instantly. It saves time, [music] it saves liquid, and it keeps your sink mess free. It saves your time, but the next one can actually save
your life. We all know leaving your drink uncovered in a crowded club is incredibly dangerous. [music] So, they created this genius fix. It's a recyclable anti- spiking drink cover.
You just stick it over your glass and poke your straw [music] through the center. Now you can safely enjoy your drink without worrying about anyone [music] slipping something in. Time for

the last one which is going to save your phone. If you're going on a vacation or you constantly drop your phone, the simple patch from Scannable [music] is a lifesaver. You literally place the anchor patch inside your phone case,
slip [music] it through the charging hole, and then attach the hook to anything else. It will make sure that your phone will never hit the [music] ground again. Simple, but so cool.
